anti_actions.instruction: Do not hardcode public shapes or constants derived only from visible tests.

must_obey.instruction: Use explicit masks for non-power-of-two tails and boundary elements.
Use fp32 accumulation for fp16/bf16 reductions unless the OpSpec declares another policy.

recommended_actions.instruction: Tune tile size, num_warps, and stages only after hidden correctness passes.

validation_plan.instruction: Report p50 and p95 latency against eager and torch.compile baselines.
